authors.author: Pauline Michael Mills
Pauline Michael Mills
Du bist würdig, du bist würdig

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Thou art worthy, Thou art worthy Thou art worthy Oh Lord. To receive glory, Glory and honour Glory and honour and power.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For Thou hast created, Hast all things created Thou hast created all things. And for Thy pleasure, They are created. Thou art worthy Oh Lord.
